hooks.command: h=$(hostname -s 2>/dev/null); osascript -e "display notification \"Session started on ${h:-this device}\" with title \"Claude Code\" subtitle \"Pincite\" sound name \"Glass\"" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true

h=$(hostname -s 2>/dev/null); osascript -e "display notification \"A device is talking to this session (${h:-unknown})\" with title \"Claude Code\" subtitle \"Pincite\" sound name \"Glass\"" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
